test_format.success: Boolean; whether the test is expected to succeed or not
test_format.stdout: String; value of stdout after execution
test_format.stderr: String; value of stderr after execution
test_format.extensions: Array; list of names of all extensions to load before testing
test_format.watchdog: Integer; watchdog tick limit, use -1 for the platform default
test_format.author: String; identity of the test author
test_format.updated: String; UTC date of test modification, formatted YYYY-MM-DD HH:II:SS
test_format.description: String; brief description of what is being tested
